name: Banana 'n Walnut Lite Delight
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 c Cut-up DOLE Fresh Fruit (oranges, grapes, plums,
1 can Lowfat vanilla, lemon or your favorite yogurt (16oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the bananas with lemon juice.
2. Layer fresh fruit, yogurt, bananas, and walnuts into 4 dishes.
3. Top with additional chopped walnuts and banana slices.
